title: Rich Savory Spanish Lamb Paella
description: A traditional Catalan dish featuring lamb, bay leaves, and a pasta water emulsion, made halal friendly, this paella is earthy and romantic.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the uncooked rice and stir to combine with the lamb and onion mixture.
Add the pasta water and bay leaves, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the bay leaves and serve hot.
